entries.title: Hyperliquid, Paradigm urge revision of GENIUS money-laundering rule
entries.snippet: The Hyperliquid Policy Center and Paradigm say the Treasury’s money-laundering rules for the GENIUS Act are too onerous for stablecoin issuers.

entries.title: Merck and Hashgraph Group launch Hedera-based product passport for EU compliance
entries.snippet: The Hedera-based platform combines product authentication and blockchain traceability to support compliance with new European Union sustainability and supply-chain reporting requirements.
entries.tweet_text: Merck and Hashgraph Group launch Hedera-based product passport for EU compliance

entries.title: NYDFS proposes stablecoin regulatory framework
entries.snippet: New York State Department of Financial Services (DFS) Acting Superintendent Kaitlin Asrow today announced a proposed regulation to build on New York’s first-in-the-nation stablecoin framework in accordance with federal regulations under the GENIUS Act.
entries.tweet_text: NYDFS proposes stablecoin regulatory framework

entries.title: Banking Circle to provide financial infrastructure for Bridge
entries.snippet: Banking Circle S.A. (Banking Circle) today announces a collaboration with Bridge, a leading stablecoin infrastructure platform and a Stripe company, to support its global money movement capabilities through Banking Circle’s regulated, API-led banking infrastructure.
entries.tweet_text: Banking @circle to provide financial infrastructure for Bridge

entries.title: New York Moves to Align Stablecoin Rules With GENIUS Act
entries.snippet: The New York State Department of Financial Services (DFS) announced a proposed regulation that would harmonize its stablecoin framework with new federal regulations. The proposed regulation would add provisions to ensure alignment with the U.S. Treasury Department’s proposed requirements for state f

entries.title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
entries.snippet: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.

entries.title: Strategy Buys Bitcoin, Pads Cash Reserves Following Biggest Weekly Stock Drop Since 2022
entries.snippet: Strategy’s stockpile was $10.7 billion underwater as of Monday morning after Bitcoin hit its lowest price since October 2024.s

entries.title: Clear Junction to support institutional access to Agent's pound sterling stablecoin GBPA
entries.snippet: Clear Junction Group, a global payments infrastructure provider serving financial institutions and cryptoasset businesses, has announced a UK-focused partnership between Clear Junction Digital Limited and Agant to support institutional access to GBPA, Agant’s Pound sterling stablecoin.

entries.title: Paymentology CTO Says Meta Program Shows Limits of Stablecoin Payouts
entries.snippet: Meta announced in March it would begin offering stablecoin payouts to Colombian and Philippines-based creators. entries.title: Michael Saylor hints at fresh bitcoin buy with 'add more dots' post as MicroStrategy sits $11.7 billion underwater
entries.snippet: The post lands a week after Strategy revealed its first bitcoin sale since 2022 and one day before voting closes on a STRC dividend amendment.

entries.snippet: During a hearing of the European Parliament’s ECON committee yesterday, ECB Executive Board member Piero Cipollone made a forceful case for public sector involvement in wholesale tokenized finance, calling it “extremely important” and warning that without it, the opportunity could be lost. entries.title: Tokenized Deposits Set Up Banking's Next Network Race
entries.snippet: As volatility again rattles large swathes of the cryptocurrency market, the largest financial institutions in the United States are moving ahead with plans for a shared tokenized deposit network. entries.snippet: The Conference of State Bank Supervisors (CSBS) has provided comments to the US Treasury on its proposed rulemaking for state issued stablecoins under the GENIUS Act. entries.title: Crypto Council for Innovation launches coalition to push for regulatory clarity on vaults
entries.snippet: A new coalition is forming, focused on crypto vaults, an increasingly popular mechanism for depositing digital assets and earning yield.

entries.title: Coinbase to launch token-backed mortgage down payments this summer
entries.snippet: A Coinbase-Better Home & Finance initiative will allow qualified borrowers to use Bitcoin and USDC as collateral for home loan down payments.
entries.tweet_text: @coinbase to launch token-backed mortgage down payments this summer

entries.title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed consortium plans to launch tokenized deposit network in early 2027
entries.snippet: The initiative would enable tokenized deposits to move instantly and support around-the-clock settlement, the Wall Street Journal reported.
entries.tweet_text: @jpmorgan, Citi-backed consortium plans to launch tokenized deposit network in early 2027

entries.title: Ether.fi allocates $100 million to a Plume RWA vault, giving users access to yield
entries.snippet: The allocation comes from a mix of ether.fi's liquidity provider base and managed capital from its existing liquid vaults.

entries.title: Google Wallet Moves Directly Into Retail Checkout Pages
entries.snippet: Google expanded the capabilities of Google Pay to include direct checkout, a new experience that brings payment options from a customer’s Google Wallet to a retailer’s checkout page. The company launched the experience Thursday (June 4) for select merchants that use Airwallex. It will soon expand it

entries.title: Triple-A puts multicurrency account on stablecoin rails
entries.snippet: Today, Triple-A, a licensed global payment institution, announces the launch of the European rollout of stablecoin-enabled Multicurrency Accounts, giving global businesses access to local banking collection rails without the need to set up a local entity.

entries.title: Apex Group supports launch of tokenised real estate fund
entries.snippet: Apex Group Ltd ("Apex Group"), a global financial services provider with over $3.5 trillion in assets serviced, today announced its role in the launch of a blockchain-native real estate fund developed in collaboration with Archax, Goldman Sachs, LRC Group, and Ownera.
entries.tweet_text: Apex Group supports launch of tokenised real estate fund

entries.snippet: Payward, the parent of the Kraken crypto exchange and owner of xStocks, has announced the launch of its IPO platform enabling access to stocks at the IPO price (rather than the secondary market price) to foreign retail investors. xStocks offers tokenized stocks which are structured loan notes, backe
entries.tweet_text: @kaboracle's tokenized stocks to offer foreign retail IPO access. In time for SpaceX?

entries.title: Clearwater Analytics brings AI into institutional investment workflow
entries.snippet: Clearwater Analytics (NYSE: CWAN) today introduced new AI-enabled products built on the same trusted investment data foundation supporting more than $10 trillion in global assets.

entries.title: Revolut's US bank to offer stablecoin services alongside FDIC-insured products
entries.snippet: Revolut U.S. CEO Cetin Duransoy told Reuters the company plans to offer access to stablecoins in the United States.

entries.title: House of Lords committee urges UK regulators to ease stablecoin rules that could stifle market growth
entries.snippet: A UK House of Lords committee warned that Britain lags the U.S. and the EU on stablecoins, calling on the BoE and FCA to revise rules.

entries.title: Revolut Wants to Give US Banking Customers Stablecoin Access
entries.snippet: Revolut reportedly plans to include stablecoins as part of its U.S. banking offering. That’s according to Revolut U.S. CEO Cetin Duransoy, interviewed Wednesday (June 3) by Reuters. In addition to stablecoins, the plan is to also give customers of the U.K.-based FinTech access to FDIC-backed product

entries.title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
entries.snippet: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.

entries.title: Russian ruble stablecoin A7A5 grows despite Western sanctions
entries.snippet: Russian ruble-backed stablecoin A7A5 processed over $110 billion in transactions despite Western sanctions, according to CertiK.

entries.title: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
entries.snippet: The FCA has warned Premier League clubs that partnerships with unlicensed crypto firms could expose fans to unregulated trading platforms.
entries.tweet_text: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals

entries.title: Bitget introduces trading in US stocks
entries.snippet: Bitget, the world’s leading Universal Exchange (UEX), has announced the launch of Bitget Stocks 2.0, an upgraded tokenized stock spot product designed to improve liquidity, asset transparency, and capital efficiency for tokenized equity trading.

entries.title: RedotPay enters B2B market
entries.snippet: RedotPay, a global stablecoin-based payment fintech company serving over 7 million users across 100+ countries, today announced the launch of RedotPay Connect at Money20/20 Europe, marking the company’s first dedicated B2B product since inception and a major step into enterprise payments.
